ops.title: User's locked decisions for the P3 backend-wiring refactor (Caps dispatch, project kill, reconcile, BackendName)
ops.body:
P3 of the cc-orchestrate audit (handoff at acct-01 `handoff-P3-backend-wiring.md`). User chose **full scope** (A+B+C) plus an architectural upgrade to Caps. Locked decisions (2026-06-17):

- **Caps → capability-driven event dispatch.** Caps becomes a typed bitset (`Capability uint`: `CanSendText`/`CanCapture`/`CanEnumerate`; `Caps{set}` + `Has(cap)`). Dispatch via capability gate + small optional interfaces (`Sender`), NOT a monolithic `Dispatch(Event)` switch (switch would force defensive `default:` cases — styleguide forbids). Registry invariant test: `Has(CanSendText) == implements Sender`.
- ~~**Send routing = Native-first + tailer audit events.**~~ ⚠️ **REVERSED 2026-07-17** (user: "piggyback cc-interact rather than having our own system"): `send-message` now always appends `orchestrate.message` to the event plane — the native typing dispatch and the `EventInbound` tailer audit were both deleted. Delivery is Claude Code channel tags (plugin `cc-orchestrate@cc-orchestrate` + managed-settings allowlist via `cco setup-channels`) with a watch-Monitor fallback until the child's first `channel-ack`. Drivers keep `SendText` only for the startup prober. See the cc-notes decision note "Decision: messages ride cc-interact event plane".
- **Capture = declare vocabulary, defer handler.** `CanCapture` stays in the enum; no `Capturer` interface/driver handlers until a real consumer exists (status comes from the transcript today).
- **project kill = soft terminal status.** project→`killed`, cascade agents→`exited`; mirror `handleAgentKill` ordering (backend kill captured, row writes, THEN surface kill error). ⚠️ **SUPERSEDED 2026-06-18:** repo-kill is now a REAL teardown (tears down each workstream's backend workspace + non-primary worktree), not soft-only — see [[cc-orchestrate-dev-gotchas]] finding #3 (commit 262a6c4). The `handleAgentKill` deferred-error ordering still holds.
- **Status consts = NAMED type** (user picked named over untyped). Name it `LifecycleStatus` (applies to both project + agent rows; presented as "AgentStatus"). Needs `string()`/`[]string{}` conversions at cc-interact boundaries (ActiveStatuses, subject Lifecycle) + JSON maps.
- **EventSpawned + config-get = both WIRED** (not removed). `notImplemented` removed.
- **BackendName = full threading**, last commit, gate on build. No `Scan`/`Value` needed (modernc sqlite handles `~string` via reflection).

See [[cc-orchestrate-is-pure-go]].
